ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXXS, XXS, XS) */,
  "numeric_size" INTEGER /* Numeric equivalent of the size (if applicable) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., fits true to size, runs small) */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size type (e.g., numerical, alphanumeric) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line (e.g., menswear, womenswear) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size for which the measurements are recorded */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line (e.g., menswear, womenswear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line (e.g., menswear, womenswear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the size type (e.g., numerical, alphanumeric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "size_recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommended size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_measurement_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
